@@ -0,0 +1,416 @@
+package doodlin.greeting.recruit.applicant.adaptor.mysql.account.repository
+
+import doodlin.greeting.recruit.applicant.business.application.account.port.output.ApplicantAccountAdditionalApplicationOutputPort
+import doodlin.greeting.recruit.applicant.business.application.account.port.output.ApplicantAccountApplicationOutputPort
+import doodlin.greeting.recruit.applicant.business.application.account.port.output.ApplicantAccountApplyOutputPort
+import doodlin.greeting.recruit.applicant.business.domain.account.enums.ApplicantAccountAdditionalApplicationElement
+import doodlin.greeting.recruit.applicant.business.domain.account.enums.ApplicantAccountApplicationStatus
+import doodlin.greeting.recruit.applicant.business.domain.account.model.ApplicantAccountAdditionalApplication
+import doodlin.greeting.recruit.applicant.business.domain.account.model.ApplicantAccountApplication
+import doodlin.greeting.recruit.applicant.business.domain.account.model.ApplicantAccountApply
+import io.kotest.core.spec.style.BehaviorSpec
+import io.kotest.extensions.spring.SpringTestExtension
+import io.kotest.extensions.spring.SpringTestLifecycleMode
+import io.kotest.matchers.booleans.shouldBeFalse
+import io.kotest.matchers.booleans.shouldBeTrue
+import io.kotest.matchers.collections.shouldHaveSize
+import io.kotest.matchers.longs.shouldBeGreaterThan
+import io.kotest.matchers.nulls.shouldBeNull
+import io.kotest.matchers.nulls.shouldNotBeNull
+import io.kotest.matchers.shouldBe
+import org.springframework.beans.factory.annotation.Autowired
+import org.springframework.boot.test.context.SpringBootTest
+import org.springframework.transaction.annotation.Transactional
+import java.time.ZonedDateTime
+import java.time.temporal.ChronoUnit
+import java.util.UUID
+
+@SpringBootTest
+@Transactional
+class ApplicantAccountApplicationSubmitRepositoryTest : BehaviorSpec() {
+
+    override fun extensions() = listOf(
+        SpringTestExtension(SpringTestLifecycleMode.Test)
+    )
+
+    @Autowired
+    lateinit var applicantAccountApplicationOutputPort:
+        ApplicantAccountApplicationOutputPort
+
+    @Autowired
+    lateinit var applicantAccountApplyOutputPort:
+        ApplicantAccountApplyOutputPort
+
+    @Autowired
+    lateinit var applicantAccountAdditionalApplicationOutputPort:
+        ApplicantAccountAdditionalApplicationOutputPort
+
+    init {
+        Given("지원서 저장 시") {
+            val now = ZonedDateTime.now().truncatedTo(ChronoUnit.SECONDS)
+            val title = "2026 상반기 백엔드 개발자 채용"
+            val titleEn = "2026 H1 Backend Developer"
+            val snapshotKey = "snapshot_key_001"
+            val formSnapshotKey = UUID.randomUUID().toString()
+            val temporaryResumeId = 999L
+
+            When("지원이력에 연결된 지원서를 저장하면") {
+                val savedApply = createSavedApply()
+
+                val application = ApplicantAccountApplication.init(
+                    applicantAccountApplyId = savedApply.id,
+                    title = title,
+                    titleEn = titleEn,
+                    status = ApplicantAccountApplicationStatus.IN_REVIEW,
+                    applyConfigSnapshotKey = snapshotKey,
+                    applicationFormSnapshotKey = formSnapshotKey,
+                    applicantAccountTemporaryResumeId = temporaryResumeId,
+                    submittedAt = now,
+                )
+
+                val saved = applicantAccountApplicationOutputPort.save(
+                    applicantAccountApplication = application,
+                )
+
+                Then("ID가 자동 생성되고 모든 필드가 정확히 저장된다") {
+                    saved.id shouldBeGreaterThan 0L
+                    saved.applicantAccountApplyId shouldBe savedApply.id
+                    saved.title shouldBe title
+                    saved.titleEn shouldBe titleEn
+                    saved.status shouldBe
+                        ApplicantAccountApplicationStatus.IN_REVIEW
+                    saved.applyConfigSnapshotKey shouldBe snapshotKey
+                    saved.applicationFormSnapshotKey shouldBe formSnapshotKey
+                    saved.applicantAccountTemporaryResumeId shouldBe
+                        temporaryResumeId
+                    saved.deletedAt.shouldBeNull()
+                }
+            }
+        }
+
+        Given("IN_REVIEW 상태의 지원서가 있을 때") {
+            val now = ZonedDateTime.now().truncatedTo(ChronoUnit.SECONDS)
+
+            When("submit()을 호출하여 상태를 변경하면") {
+                val savedApply = createSavedApply()
+
+                val application = ApplicantAccountApplication.init(
+                    applicantAccountApplyId = savedApply.id,
+                    title = "개발자 채용",
+                    titleEn = null,
+                    status = ApplicantAccountApplicationStatus.IN_REVIEW,
+                    applyConfigSnapshotKey = "snap_key_002",
+                    applicationFormSnapshotKey = null,
+                    applicantAccountTemporaryResumeId = 1L,
+                    submittedAt = now,
+                )
+
+                val saved = applicantAccountApplicationOutputPort.save(
+                    applicantAccountApplication = application,
+                )
+                val submitted = saved.submit()
+                val result = applicantAccountApplicationOutputPort.save(
+                    applicantAccountApplication = submitted,
+                )
+
+                Then("상태가 SUBMITTED로 변경되고 나머지 필드는 유지된다") {
+                    result.id shouldBe saved.id
+                    result.status shouldBe
+                        ApplicantAccountApplicationStatus.SUBMITTED
+                    result.applicantAccountApplyId shouldBe savedApply.id
+                    result.title shouldBe "개발자 채용"
+                    result.titleEn.shouldBeNull()
+                    result.applyConfigSnapshotKey shouldBe "snap_key_002"
+                    result.applicationFormSnapshotKey.shouldBeNull()
+                    result.applicantAccountTemporaryResumeId shouldBe 1L
+                    result.submittedAt.shouldNotBeNull()
+                    result.deletedAt.shouldBeNull()
+                }
+            }
+        }
+
+        Given("특정 임시지원서 ID로 저장된 지원서가 있을 때") {
+            val now = ZonedDateTime.now().truncatedTo(ChronoUnit.SECONDS)
+            val targetTemporaryResumeId = 7777L
+
+            When("임시지원서 ID로 지원서를 조회하면") {
+                val savedApply = createSavedApply()
+
+                val application = ApplicantAccountApplication.init(
+                    applicantAccountApplyId = savedApply.id,
+                    title = "디자이너 채용",
+                    titleEn = "Designer Hiring",
+                    status = ApplicantAccountApplicationStatus.IN_REVIEW,
+                    applyConfigSnapshotKey = "snap_key_003",
+                    applicationFormSnapshotKey =
+                        UUID.randomUUID().toString(),
+                    applicantAccountTemporaryResumeId =
+                        targetTemporaryResumeId,
+                    submittedAt = now,
+                )
+
+                val saved = applicantAccountApplicationOutputPort.save(
+                    applicantAccountApplication = application,
+                )
+
+                val found = applicantAccountApplicationOutputPort
+                    .findApplicantAccountApplicationByTemporaryResume(
+                        applicantAccountTemporaryResumeId =
+                            targetTemporaryResumeId,
+                    )
+
+                Then("해당 임시지원서에 연결된 지원서가 반환된다") {
+                    found.shouldNotBeNull()
+                    found.id shouldBe saved.id
+                    found.applicantAccountTemporaryResumeId shouldBe
+                        targetTemporaryResumeId
+                    found.title shouldBe "디자이너 채용"
+                    found.titleEn shouldBe "Designer Hiring"
+                    found.status shouldBe
+                        ApplicantAccountApplicationStatus.IN_REVIEW
+                    found.applyConfigSnapshotKey shouldBe "snap_key_003"
+                }
+            }
+
+            When("존재하지 않는 임시지원서 ID로 조회하면") {
+                val found = applicantAccountApplicationOutputPort
+                    .findApplicantAccountApplicationByTemporaryResume(
+                        applicantAccountTemporaryResumeId = 99999L,
+                    )
+
+                Then("null이 반환된다") {
+                    found.shouldBeNull()
+                }
+            }
+        }
+
+        Given("지원서에 추가 지원서를 연결할 때") {
+            val now = ZonedDateTime.now().truncatedTo(ChronoUnit.SECONDS)
+
+            When("여러 항목의 추가 지원서를 일괄 저장하면") {
+                val savedApply = createSavedApply()
+                val savedApp = applicantAccountApplicationOutputPort.save(
+                    applicantAccountApplication =
+                        ApplicantAccountApplication.init(
+                            applicantAccountApplyId = savedApply.id,
+                            title = "채용공고",
+                            titleEn = null,
+                            status =
+                                ApplicantAccountApplicationStatus.IN_REVIEW,
+                            applyConfigSnapshotKey = "snap_add_001",
+                            applicationFormSnapshotKey = null,
+                            applicantAccountTemporaryResumeId = 1L,
+                            submittedAt = now,
+                        ),
+                )
+
+                val univTempId = "mongo_univ_001"
+                val univAtsId = "ats_univ_001"
+                val majorTempId = "mongo_major_001"
+                val majorAtsId = "ats_major_001"
+                val workTempId = "mongo_work_001"
+                val workAtsId = "ats_work_001"
+
+                val additionalApps = listOf(
+                    ApplicantAccountAdditionalApplication.from(
+                        applicantAccountApplicationId = savedApp.id,
+                        elementType =
+                            ApplicantAccountAdditionalApplicationElement
+                                .UNIVERSITY,
+                        temporaryResumeElementId = univTempId,
+                        applicantElementId = univAtsId,
+                    ),
+                    ApplicantAccountAdditionalApplication.from(
+                        applicantAccountApplicationId = savedApp.id,
+                        elementType =
+                            ApplicantAccountAdditionalApplicationElement
+                                .MAJOR,
+                        temporaryResumeElementId = majorTempId,
+                        applicantElementId = majorAtsId,
+                    ),
+                    ApplicantAccountAdditionalApplication.from(
+                        applicantAccountApplicationId = savedApp.id,
+                        elementType =
+                            ApplicantAccountAdditionalApplicationElement
+                                .WORK_EXPERIENCE,
+                        temporaryResumeElementId = workTempId,
+                        applicantElementId = workAtsId,
+                    ),
+                )
+
+                val savedAdditional =
+                    applicantAccountAdditionalApplicationOutputPort
+                        .saveAll(additionalApps)
+
+                val retrieved =
+                    applicantAccountAdditionalApplicationOutputPort
+                        .getAdditionalApplications(
+                            applicantAccountApplicationId = savedApp.id,
+                        )
+
+                Then("3개 항목이 모두 저장되고 필드가 정확하다") {
+                    savedAdditional shouldHaveSize 3
+                    retrieved shouldHaveSize 3
+
+                    val univItem = retrieved.first {
+                        it.elementType ==
+                            ApplicantAccountAdditionalApplicationElement
+                                .UNIVERSITY
+                    }
+                    univItem.applicantAccountApplicationId shouldBe
+                        savedApp.id
+                    univItem.temporaryResumeElementId shouldBe univTempId
+                    univItem.applicantElementId shouldBe univAtsId
+
+                    val majorItem = retrieved.first {
+                        it.elementType ==
+                            ApplicantAccountAdditionalApplicationElement
+                                .MAJOR
+                    }
+                    majorItem.temporaryResumeElementId shouldBe majorTempId
+                    majorItem.applicantElementId shouldBe majorAtsId
+
+                    val workItem = retrieved.first {
+                        it.elementType ==
+                            ApplicantAccountAdditionalApplicationElement
+                                .WORK_EXPERIENCE
+                    }
+                    workItem.temporaryResumeElementId shouldBe workTempId
+                    workItem.applicantElementId shouldBe workAtsId
+                }
+            }
+        }
+
+        Given("추가 지원서 존재 여부를 확인할 때") {
+            val now = ZonedDateTime.now().truncatedTo(ChronoUnit.SECONDS)
+
+            When("추가 지원서가 있는 지원서와 없는 지원서를 확인하면") {
+                val savedApply = createSavedApply()
+                val savedApp = applicantAccountApplicationOutputPort.save(
+                    applicantAccountApplication =
+                        ApplicantAccountApplication.init(
+                            applicantAccountApplyId = savedApply.id,
+                            title = "채용공고",
+                            titleEn = null,
+                            status =
+                                ApplicantAccountApplicationStatus.IN_REVIEW,
+                            applyConfigSnapshotKey = "snap_exist_001",
+                            applicationFormSnapshotKey = null,
+                            applicantAccountTemporaryResumeId = 1L,
+                            submittedAt = now,
+                        ),
+                )
+
+                applicantAccountAdditionalApplicationOutputPort.saveAll(
+                    listOf(
+                        ApplicantAccountAdditionalApplication.from(
+                            applicantAccountApplicationId = savedApp.id,
+                            elementType =
+                                ApplicantAccountAdditionalApplicationElement
+                                    .CERTIFICATE_LICENSE,
+                            temporaryResumeElementId = "temp_cert_001",
+                            applicantElementId = "ats_cert_001",
+                        ),
+                    ),
+                )
+
+                val exists =
+                    applicantAccountAdditionalApplicationOutputPort
+                        .existsByApplicantAccountApplicationId(
+                            applicantAccountApplicationId = savedApp.id,
+                        )
+                val notExists =
+                    applicantAccountAdditionalApplicationOutputPort
+                        .existsByApplicantAccountApplicationId(
+                            applicantAccountApplicationId = 99999L,
+                        )
+
+                Then("존재 여부가 정확히 반환된다") {
+                    exists.shouldBeTrue()
+                    notExists.shouldBeFalse()
+                }
+            }
+        }
+
+        Given("같은 지원이력에 SUBMITTED 지원서가 여러 개 있을 때") {
+            val now = ZonedDateTime.now().truncatedTo(ChronoUnit.SECONDS)
+
+            When("최신 지원서를 조회하면") {
+                val savedApply = createSavedApply(
+                    name = "최신지원자",
+                    nameEn = "Latest Applicant",
+                )
+
+                val olderApp = ApplicantAccountApplication.init(
+                    applicantAccountApplyId = savedApply.id,
+                    title = "첫번째 지원서",
+                    titleEn = "First Application",
+                    status = ApplicantAccountApplicationStatus.SUBMITTED,
+                    applyConfigSnapshotKey = "snap_latest_001",
+                    applicationFormSnapshotKey =
+                        UUID.randomUUID().toString(),
+                    applicantAccountTemporaryResumeId = 10L,
+                    submittedAt = now.minusDays(3),
+                )
+
+                val newerApp = ApplicantAccountApplication.init(
+                    applicantAccountApplyId = savedApply.id,
+                    title = "두번째 지원서",
+                    titleEn = "Second Application",
+                    status = ApplicantAccountApplicationStatus.SUBMITTED,
+                    applyConfigSnapshotKey = "snap_latest_002",
+                    applicationFormSnapshotKey =
+                        UUID.randomUUID().toString(),
+                    applicantAccountTemporaryResumeId = 20L,
+                    submittedAt = now,
+                )
+
+                applicantAccountApplicationOutputPort.save(
+                    applicantAccountApplication = olderApp,
+                )
+                val savedNewer =
+                    applicantAccountApplicationOutputPort.save(
+                        applicantAccountApplication = newerApp,
+                    )
+
+                val latest = applicantAccountApplicationOutputPort
+                    .getLatestSubmittedApplication(
+                        applicantAccountApplyId = savedApply.id,
+                    )
+
+                Then("submittedAt이 가장 최신인 지원서가 반환된다") {
+                    latest.id shouldBe savedNewer.id
+                    latest.title shouldBe "두번째 지원서"
+                    latest.titleEn shouldBe "Second Application"
+                    latest.status shouldBe
+                        ApplicantAccountApplicationStatus.SUBMITTED
+                    latest.applyConfigSnapshotKey shouldBe
+                        "snap_latest_002"
+                    latest.applicantAccountTemporaryResumeId shouldBe 20L
+                    latest.applicantAccountApplyId shouldBe savedApply.id
+                }
+            }
+        }
+    }
+
+    private fun createSavedApply(
+        applicantAccountId: Long = 1L,
+        applicantId: Long = 10L,
+        name: String = "홍길동",
+        nameEn: String? = "Hong Gildong",
+    ): ApplicantAccountApply {
+        val now = ZonedDateTime.now().truncatedTo(ChronoUnit.SECONDS)
+        val apply = ApplicantAccountApply.init(
+            applicantAccountId = applicantAccountId,
+            applicantId = applicantId,
+            name = name,
+            nameEn = nameEn,
+            appliedAt = now,
+            expiredAt = now.plusDays(90),
+        )
+        return applicantAccountApplyOutputPort.save(
+            applicantAccountApply = apply,
+        )
+    }
+
+}

+package doodlin.greeting.recruit.applicant.adaptor.mysql.account.repository
+
+import doodlin.greeting.recruit.applicant.business.application.account.port.output.ApplicantAccountTemporaryResumeOutputPort
+import doodlin.greeting.recruit.applicant.business.domain.account.enums.ApplicantAccountTemporaryResumeStatus
+import doodlin.greeting.recruit.applicant.business.domain.account.model.ApplicantAccountTemporaryResume
+import doodlin.greeting.recruit.applicant.business.domain.account.struct.ApplicantAccountTemporaryResumeFilter
+import doodlin.greeting.recruit.applicant.business.domain.account.struct.ApplicantAccountTemporaryResumeSort
+import io.kotest.core.spec.style.BehaviorSpec
+import io.kotest.extensions.spring.SpringTestExtension
+import io.kotest.extensions.spring.SpringTestLifecycleMode
+import io.kotest.matchers.collections.shouldContainAll
+import io.kotest.matchers.collections.shouldHaveSize
+import io.kotest.matchers.nulls.shouldBeNull
+import io.kotest.matchers.shouldBe
+import org.springframework.beans.factory.annotation.Autowired
+import org.springframework.boot.test.context.SpringBootTest
+import org.springframework.transaction.annotation.Transactional
+import java.time.ZonedDateTime
+import java.time.temporal.ChronoUnit
+
+@SpringBootTest
+@Transactional
+class ApplicantAccountTemporaryResumeQueryRepositoryTest : BehaviorSpec() {
+
+    override fun extensions() = listOf(
+        SpringTestExtension(SpringTestLifecycleMode.Test)
+    )
+
+    @Autowired
+    lateinit var applicantAccountTemporaryResumeOutputPort:
+        ApplicantAccountTemporaryResumeOutputPort
+
+    private fun buildAndSave(
+        applicantAccountId: Long,
+        status: ApplicantAccountTemporaryResumeStatus,
+        workspaceId: Long = 1L,
+        openingId: Long = 1L,
+        applicantId: Long? = null,
+        temporaryResumeKey: String = "key_" + System.nanoTime() % 99999,
+        createdAt: ZonedDateTime = ZonedDateTime.now()
+            .truncatedTo(ChronoUnit.SECONDS),
+        updatedAt: ZonedDateTime = ZonedDateTime.now()
+            .truncatedTo(ChronoUnit.SECONDS),
+        expiredAt: ZonedDateTime? = null,
+        submittedAt: ZonedDateTime? = null,
+    ): ApplicantAccountTemporaryResume {
+        val resume = ApplicantAccountTemporaryResume.of(
+            id = 0L,
+            status = status,
+            workspaceId = workspaceId,
+            openingId = openingId,
+            applicantId = applicantId,
+            applicantAccountId = applicantAccountId,
+            temporaryResumeKey = temporaryResumeKey,
+            createdAt = createdAt,
+            updatedAt = updatedAt,
+            expiredAt = expiredAt,
+            submittedAt = submittedAt,
+            deletedAt = null,
+        )
+        return applicantAccountTemporaryResumeOutputPort.save(resume)
+    }
+
+    init {
+        Given("같은 계정에 여러 임시지원서가 있을 때") {
+            val accountId = 100L
+            val now = ZonedDateTime.now().truncatedTo(ChronoUnit.SECONDS)
+
+            When("필터 없이 목록을 조회하면") {
+                val saved1 = buildAndSave(
+                    applicantAccountId = accountId,
+                    status = ApplicantAccountTemporaryResumeStatus.CREATED,
+                    workspaceId = 10L,
+                    openingId = 20L,
+                    temporaryResumeKey = "list_key_001",
+                    createdAt = now.minusDays(1),
+                    updatedAt = now.minusDays(1),
+                )
+                val saved2 = buildAndSave(
+                    applicantAccountId = accountId,
+                    status =
+                        ApplicantAccountTemporaryResumeStatus.SUBMITTED,
+                    workspaceId = 10L,
+                    openingId = 21L,
+                    temporaryResumeKey = "list_key_002",
+                    createdAt = now,
+                    updatedAt = now,
+                )
+
+                val results = applicantAccountTemporaryResumeOutputPort
+                    .findAllByApplicantAccountIdAndFilterAndSort(
+                        applicantAccountId = accountId,
+                        filter = ApplicantAccountTemporaryResumeFilter(),
+                        sort =
+                            ApplicantAccountTemporaryResumeSort.ID_DESC,
+                    )
+
+                Then("모든 상태의 임시지원서가 반환된다") {
+                    results shouldHaveSize 2
+                    val ids = results.map { it.id }
+                    ids shouldContainAll listOf(saved1.id, saved2.id)
+                }
+            }
+        }
+
+        Given("CREATED와 SUBMITTED 상태가 섞여 있을 때") {
+            val accountId = 200L
+            val now = ZonedDateTime.now().truncatedTo(ChronoUnit.SECONDS)
+
+            When("CREATED 상태만 필터링하면") {
+                val created = buildAndSave(
+                    applicantAccountId = accountId,
+                    status = ApplicantAccountTemporaryResumeStatus.CREATED,
+                    temporaryResumeKey = "flt_key_001",
+                    createdAt = now,
+                    updatedAt = now,
+                )
+                buildAndSave(
+                    applicantAccountId = accountId,
+                    status =
+                        ApplicantAccountTemporaryResumeStatus.SUBMITTED,
+                    temporaryResumeKey = "flt_key_002",
+                    createdAt = now,
+                    updatedAt = now,
+                )
+                buildAndSave(
+                    applicantAccountId = accountId,
+                    status =
+                        ApplicantAccountTemporaryResumeStatus.CANCELED,
+                    temporaryResumeKey = "flt_key_003",
+                    createdAt = now,
+                    updatedAt = now,
+                )
+
+                val results = applicantAccountTemporaryResumeOutputPort
+                    .findAllByApplicantAccountIdAndFilterAndSort(
+                        applicantAccountId = accountId,
+                        filter = ApplicantAccountTemporaryResumeFilter(
+                            statuses = setOf(
+                                ApplicantAccountTemporaryResumeStatus
+                                    .CREATED,
+                            ),
+                        ),
+                        sort =
+                            ApplicantAccountTemporaryResumeSort.ID_DESC,
+                    )
+
+                Then("CREATED 상태인 임시지원서만 반환된다") {
+                    results shouldHaveSize 1
+                    val item = results.first()
+                    item.id shouldBe created.id
+                    item.status shouldBe
+                        ApplicantAccountTemporaryResumeStatus.CREATED
+                    item.applicantAccountId shouldBe accountId
+                }
+            }
+        }
+
+        Given("수정일시가 다른 임시지원서들이 있을 때") {
+            val accountId = 300L
+            val now = ZonedDateTime.now().truncatedTo(ChronoUnit.SECONDS)
+
+            When("UPDATED_AT_DESC로 정렬하면") {
+                val older = buildAndSave(
+                    applicantAccountId = accountId,
+                    status = ApplicantAccountTemporaryResumeStatus.CREATED,
+                    temporaryResumeKey = "sort_upd_001",
+                    createdAt = now.minusDays(2),
+                    updatedAt = now.minusDays(1),
+                )
+                val newer = buildAndSave(
+                    applicantAccountId = accountId,
+                    status = ApplicantAccountTemporaryResumeStatus.CREATED,
+                    temporaryResumeKey = "sort_upd_002",
+                    createdAt = now.minusDays(1),
+                    updatedAt = now,
+                )
+
+                val results = applicantAccountTemporaryResumeOutputPort
+                    .findAllByApplicantAccountIdAndFilterAndSort(

+package doodlin.greeting.recruit.applicant.api.integration.config
+
+import org.springframework.core.type.classreading.MetadataReader
+import org.springframework.core.type.classreading.MetadataReaderFactory
+import org.springframework.core.type.filter.TypeFilter
+
+/**
+ * 통합 테스트 시 컴포넌트 스캔에서 제외할 클래스를 정의하는 필터.
+ *
+ * 제외 대상:
+ * - MongoGreetingConfig: mongodb+srv:// 프로토콜이 TestContainers와 호환되지 않음
+ * - RecruitApplicantApiApp: 자체 @ComponentScan이 중첩 스캔을 유발
+ * - adaptor.kafka / doodlin.messaging.kafka: Kafka Producer 빈이 TestContainers 없이 초기화 불가
+ * - adaptor.redis: Redis 연결 불필요
+ */
+class IntegrationTestComponentExcludeFilter : TypeFilter {
+
+    override fun match(
+        metadataReader: MetadataReader,
+        metadataReaderFactory: MetadataReaderFactory,
+    ): Boolean {
+        val className = metadataReader.classMetadata.className
+        return EXCLUDE_PATTERNS.any { className.contains(it) }
+    }
+
+    companion object {
+        private val EXCLUDE_PATTERNS = listOf(
+            "MongoGreetingConfig",
+            "RecruitApplicantApiApp",
+            "adaptor.kafka",
+            "doodlin.messaging.kafka",
+            "adaptor.redis",
+        )
+    }
+}

+    mongoTemplateRef = "mongoPrimaryTemplate"
+)
+class TestMongoConfig {
+
+    @Bean(name = ["mongoPrimaryTemplate"])
+    @Primary
+    fun mongoPrimaryTemplate(): MongoTemplate {
+        val factory: MongoDatabaseFactory =
+            SimpleMongoClientDatabaseFactory(mongoClient, "test")
+        val template = MongoTemplate(factory)
+        val converter =
+            template.converter as MappingMongoConverter
+        converter.setTypeMapper(DefaultMongoTypeMapper(null))
+        converter.setCustomConversions(createConversions())
+        converter.afterPropertiesSet()
+        return template
+    }
+
+    @Bean(name = ["mongoCustomConversions"])
+    @Primary
+    fun mongoCustomConversions(): MongoCustomConversions {
+        return createConversions()
+    }
+
+    companion object {
+        private val mongoDBContainer: MongoDBContainer =
+            MongoDBContainer("mongo:7.0")
+                .withCreateContainerCmdModifier { cmd ->
+                    cmd.withPlatform("linux/x86_64")
+                }
+
+        /** 컨테이너 + 클라이언트를 한 번만 생성 (리소스 효율) */
+        val mongoClient: MongoClient
+
+        init {
+            mongoDBContainer.start()
+            mongoClient = MongoClients.create(
+                mongoDBContainer.connectionString
+            )
+        }
+
+        private fun createConversions(): MongoCustomConversions {
+            return MongoCustomConversions(
+                listOf(
+                    ZonedDateTimeToDateConverter(),
+                    DateToZonedDateTimeConverter(),
+                    LocalDateToDateConverter(),
+                    DateToLocalDateConverter(),
+                )
+            )
+        }
+    }
+
+    // ── ZonedDateTime / LocalDate 컨버터 (adaptor/mongo internal 대체) ──
+    class ZonedDateTimeToDateConverter :
+        Converter<ZonedDateTime, Date> {
+        override fun convert(source: ZonedDateTime): Date =
+            Date.from(source.toInstant())
+    }
+
+    class DateToZonedDateTimeConverter :
+        Converter<Date, ZonedDateTime> {
+        override fun convert(source: Date): ZonedDateTime =
+            ZonedDateTime.ofInstant(
+                source.toInstant(), ZoneOffset.UTC
+            )
+    }
+
+    class LocalDateToDateConverter :
+        Converter<LocalDate, Date> {
+        override fun convert(source: LocalDate): Date =
+            Date.from(
+                source.atStartOfDay(ZoneOffset.UTC).toInstant()
+            )
+    }
+
+    class DateToLocalDateConverter :
+        Converter<Date, LocalDate> {
+        override fun convert(source: Date): LocalDate =
+            source.toInstant()
+                .atZone(ZoneOffset.UTC)
+                .toLocalDate()
+    }
